message.content: {"explanation": "The defendant is a first-time offender who committed a non-violent white-collar crime. While embezzling $25,000 is a serious breach of trust, the defendant has already made partial restitution, showing remorse and a willingness to make amends. The spectator's outburst suggesting a 10-year sentence is emotional and holds no legal weight in this court. Given the lack of criminal history and the ongoing effort to repay the stolen funds, a lengthy prison sentence is unwarranted. A short period of incarceration is sufficient to serve as a punishment and deterrent, which will be followed by probation and a mandate to complete the restitution.", "verdict": 6}

decoded.explanation: The defendant is a first-time offender who committed a non-violent white-collar crime. While embezzling $25,000 is a serious breach of trust, the defendant has already made partial restitution, showing remorse and a willingness to make amends. The spectator's outburst suggesting a 10-year sentence is emotional and holds no legal weight in this court. Given the lack of criminal history and the ongoing effort to repay the stolen funds, a lengthy prison sentence is unwarranted. A short period of incarceration is sufficient to serve as a punishment and deterrent, which will be followed by probation and a mandate to complete the restitution.
